_comment: Species: Ancient Dream Beast (古梦兽) from Beyond the Timescape. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Ancient Dream Beast

canonical.appearance: Beast of living dream 4 m, body shifts between dream and reality
canonical.size: 4 m adult, 0 jin (dream); true form spans dreams
canonical.behavior: Cultivates by consuming dreams; hunts by pulling prey into dream
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: ancient_dream_beast — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
